subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth Him Who is the Intended One, Who hath raised up from the name of Abu'l-Hasan the name of the Trusted One and adorned [it] with the ornament [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که از اسم ابوالحسن اسم امین مبعوث فرمود و بطراز
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
